rationale: Creator explicitly requested PS1/N64 retro aesthetics ('entre la N64 et la PS1 avec des effets propres a ces consoles en ultra low pixel / low polygon avec effets volumetriques coherents'). CRT post-process was already solid, but 3D meshes had no PS1 treatment. Enhanced ps1_material.gdshader with temporal vertex jitter (polygon shimmer), clip-space snapping, UV quantization, 15-bit color banding. Created BrocRetroMaterials module to apply it to all forest meshes with per-category jitter intensity.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt on PS1 material pipeline: test with actual GLB assets, verify no visual regressions. Then: scene flow cleanup (remove IntroPersonalityQuiz + SceneRencontreMerlin per creator feedback q-20260414-005).
